% This is generated by ESQL's CommandDocsTests. Do not edit it. See docs/reference/query-languages/esql/README.md for how to regenerate it.

```esql
FROM employees,
     (FROM sample_data
      | STATS cnt = count(*) by client_ip
      | SORT cnt DESC
      | LIMIT 1)
| WHERE (emp_no >= 10091 AND emp_no < 10094) OR emp_no IS NULL
| SORT emp_no, client_ip
| KEEP emp_no, languages, cnt, client_ip
```

| emp_no:integer | languages:integer | cnt:long | client_ip:ip |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 10091 | 3 | null | null |
| 10092 | 1 | null | null |
| 10093 | 3 | null | null |
| null | null | 4 | 172.21.3.15 |
